case_title: COLLEEN S. CLAITOR CONTRERAS VS. PLEXUSNET BROADCASTING CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONTRERAS, COLLEEN S. CLAITOR AS TO DEFENDANT PLEXUSNET BROADCASTING CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PLEXUSNET BROADCASTING CORPORATION $7,329.25 PRINCIPAL, $60.81 INTEREST, $104.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,494.06, TOTAL JUDGMENT IS $7494.06, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
